message: This is the hard-fail leg of the contract-threshold policy (.engine/policies/contract-threshold.md): a contract's Significance and Anti-choice sections must each be filled in — not left blank and not left as the template's placeholder. A record that does not say what it constrains (Significance) and what real alternative was weighed and rejected (Anti-choice) is structurally not a contract. This check verifies only that those two sections carry some real content (PRESENCE is checkable); whether that content is genuinely significant or a genuine alternative is a judgement that stays the author's and the operator's at the pull request (GENUINENESS stays posture). Fill the flagged section with substantive text before merging.
